programme.title: Recoil
programme.desc: When his family is killed by a notorious gang, Ryan Varett, a former police officer, suits up to seek revenge against the perpetrators.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: Five years after saving the Lego world, Emmet must once again save everyone with the help of Rex Dangervest when new enemies from outer space attack them.

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: With the help of warrior Rita Vrataski, Major William Cage has to save Earth and the human race from an alien species, after being caught in a time loop.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: Assassin John Wick is on a mission to fight his way to the High Table and earn his long-sought freedom. However, a new enemy stands in his way with power that turns his old friends into enemies.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After their victory in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta must participate in the 75th Annual Hunger Games, featuring all its previous winners.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Cam, a bike messenger, is wanted by the Chinese mafia, and he is on the run while learning parkour after crashing into a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: The key aspects of filmmaking are explored, with behind-the-scenes insights and intriguing interviews with prominent cast and crew members.

programme.title: The Idle Class
programme.desc: A tramp bumps into a woman in an upscale resort where she is arguing with her drunk husband. Complications arise when she mistakes the tramp to be her husband.

programme.title: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: A gang of thugs holds captive a US Border Patrol agent and his daughter in the wilderness.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: Nolan Hayes faces challenges to keep Abigail, his newborn daughter who is on a ventilator, alive when Hurricane Katrina impacts the functionality and electricity of the hospital.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two philanderers get stuck in a situation when one of them falls for the bridesmaid at one of the weddings that they intrude.

programme.title: Superfast!
programme.desc: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: Wonder Woman battles Maxwell Lorenzano, an evil businessman, and Barbara Minerva, her friend-turned-foe, who wreak havoc on the world through a wish-granting artefact.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong and a wisecracking detective from Los Angeles must overcome their differences and work together to find the missing daughter of a Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Circumstances force Rocky to retire from boxing. However, he soon accepts to train a young boxer named Tommy Gunn at his older trainer Mickey Goldmill's gym.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Tiger Town
programme.desc: Recovering from his wounds, Gamby returns to a dramatically changed North Jackson High in the season premiere of the HBO comedy series.

programme.title: Slaughter
programme.desc: Gamby fingers a suspect, with Dayshawn’s help; Russell tests out a kindness strategy at school.

programme.title: Jane Fonda In Five Acts
programme.desc: An intimate look at Oscar®-winner Jane Fonda’s journey, which was marked by controversy, tragedy and transformation.

programme.title: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sex, drugs, and risky deals. What would you trade for an all-time high?

programme.title: Heir To An Execution: A Granddaughter’s Story
programme.desc: This film chronicles the lives and deaths of martyrs and atomic spies, Julius and Ethel Rosenberg, told through their granddaughter and filmmaker, Ivy Meeropol.

programme.title: Keanu
programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: It was love at first site for Jonathan and Kate but fate kept them apart for years. Now both, on the verge of marriage, decide to reverse fate.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The untold story of the Witches of Oz, spotlighting the untold stories of Oz's most infamous characters.

programme.title: Very Ralph
programme.desc: The first documentary portrait of fashion icon Ralph Lauren, reveals the man behind the icon and the creation of one of the most successful brands in fashion history.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events.

programme.title: Salem's Lot
programme.desc: A vampire terrifies the inhabitants of the small New England town of Jerusalem's Lot.

Shark Island
programme.desc: Four friends in a resort island have to save themselves from genetically modified sharks while trying to find a cure in a nearby research centre.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane and his estranged son must put aside their differences and work together to get a Russian whistleblower to safety and thwart a disastrous crime in Chernobyl.

programme.title: Free Guy
programme.desc: Guy lives a seemingly peaceful life as a bank teller. However, an encounter with a pretty but mysterious woman makes him realise that he is a non-playable character in a massive online video game.

programme.title: Monster Hunt
programme.desc: In a world where humans and monsters are at odds with each other, a baby has the potential to bring the two factions together. However, its parents are forced to protect it from dangerous threats.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny
programme.desc: After getting conned by Helena, a blackmarket dealer, archaeologist Indiana Jones races against time to get his hands on a priceless Dial.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat causes a monumental disaster when his nut chasing leads to a continental drift. Once again, Manny, Diego and Sid experience an adventure while trying to return home.

programme.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
programme.desc: Thor joins forces with King Valkyrie, Korg and his former girlfriend Jane Foster to battle Gorr the God Butcher, whose evil plans entail the extinction of the gods.

programme.title: John Carter
programme.desc: John Carter finds himself transported to Mars, where he learns about his superhuman capabilities. Things take a turn when he rescues a princess who is on the run.

programme.title: The Interview
programme.desc: Aaron and Dave, who run a popular late-night show, get a chance to interview Kim Jong-un. The CIA decides to take advantage of the opportunity and devices a plan to assassinate the infamous dictator.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: A team of commandos led by a Vietnam War veteran is sent to rescue hostages in a Central American jungle. They soon discover that they are being hunted by a deadly creature.

programme.title: Ainbo
programme.desc: When an entrepreneur and his company threaten to destroy the land of Ainbo's tribe, she tries to save it with the help of animal spirits, Vaca and Dillo.

programme.title: Cosmoball
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a galactic war that shattered the moon and shifted Earth's poles, a massive spaceship named 'Cosmoball' hovers ominously above the planet.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson, a Nazirite takes on the role of rescuing Israelites from the oppression. However, he soon finds himself caught up in the evil machinations of a prince, which leads him to seek revenge.

programme.title: Tasmanian Devils
programme.desc: A bunch of adventurous base jumpers ends up voyaging to a prohibited zone of the Tasmanian wilderness. Subsequently, ancient and huge Tasmanian devils get awakened and start targeting the friends.

programme.title: Incredibles 2
programme.desc: Entrusted with a task to restore public faith in superheroes, Helen sets off on a mission to catch a supervillain, while Bob faces the challenges of stay-at-home parenting.

programme.title: The Mermaid ()
programme.desc: Shan, a beautiful mermaid, is sent on a mission to kill Liu Xuan, a business tycoon. However, complications arise when they develop feelings for each other.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A collective of Iraq War veterans seek to clear their name with the US military after being framed for criminal activity.

programme.title: Cars 3
programme.desc: Lighting McQueen, a legendary racer, is overcome by new generation racers. Later, he sets out to prove that he is the best racer in the world with the help of a technician, Cruz Ramirez.

programme.title: Ford v Ferrari
programme.desc: Carroll Shelby, an automotive designer, and Ken Miles, a race car driver, join hands to build a trailblazing vehicle and compete against the Ferrari race cars.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, where the rich reside in an advanced space station and the rest of the people thrive in poverty on Earth, a former criminal sets off on a mission to reinstate equality.

programme.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides
programme.desc: Captain Jack Sparrow sets sail in search of the legendary fountain of youth. However, he comes across a woman from his past, an old enemy and a feared pirate in his quest.

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer
programme.desc: The Fantastic Four fight against all odds to defeat a powerful foe, Silver Surfer, and stop him from destroying Earth before it's too late.

programme.title: King Of Serpant
programme.desc: A man's small village faces certain death unless he kills a giant python. So, he leads the hunt against the beast to keep his village safe.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: Detective Hercule Poirot investigates a murder aboard the Orient Express.

programme.title: BraveStorm
programme.desc: Two families equipped with armed robots decide to come together and fight extraterrestrial aliens threatening the existence of mankind on Earth.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: A young Nazi adherent, Jojo Betzler, whose imaginary companion is a comical imitation of Adolf Hitler, finds his beliefs challenged when he discovers the presence of a hidden Jewish girl in his house.

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: A high-powered editor forces her young assistant to marry her in order to avoid deportation.

programme.title: Cars 2
programme.desc: Star racecar Lightning McQueen and his friend Mater journey abroad to participate in a Grand Prix race. The path to the championship becomes troublesome when Mater gets involved in espionage.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: A martial artist decides to have a low profile following his humiliating loss to the famous Ip Man. However, circumstances put him in the crosshairs of a powerful drug smuggler.

programme.title: Operation Red Sea
programme.desc: A Chinese special forces unit must rescue their fellow citizens in the country of Yewaire on the Arabian Peninsula amidst a violent coup and threats from a terrorist group.

programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Following a career-ending injury, Russian ballerina Dominika Egorova becomes a deadly spy through a brutal training regimen at a special espionage school.

programme.title: Bad Connection
programme.desc: When a downtrodden young waitress buys a stolen cell phone and discovers a snuff film on it, she soon finds herself on the run from a maniacal madman who is hell-bent on getting it back.

programme.title: Unbending Mr. Fang
programme.desc: Fang Shiyu, a martial artist, decides to exact revenge on the corrupt officials who falsefully accuse and frame in a case of corruption.

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: A legendary detective tries to prevent three thieves from pulling off the heist of a lifetime.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson, a Nazirite takes on the role of rescuing Israelites from the oppression. However, he soon finds himself caught up in the evil machinations of a prince, which leads him to seek revenge.

programme.title: Ip Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: Ip Man prevents a kidnapping attempt during his visit to Hong Kong. However, this prompts a human trafficking ring to retaliate by holding his friends captive, and now he must save them.

programme.title: The Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: A family vacation takes a detour when workaholic realtor Jim Evers stops to close a deal at a remote mansion. However, they soon realise the estate is haunted by a restless spirit.

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
programme.desc: Wolverine travels back in time to stop Mystique from assassinating Bolivar Trask, whose death leads to the creation of the Sentinels, which are robots designed to kill mutants.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Alita, a battle cyborg, is resurrected by Ido, a doctor, who finds out that she has the soul of a teenager. Later, she sets out to uncover her past and find her true identity.

programme.title: Restart the Earth
programme.desc: An accidental development of a chemical helps in the liberation of plant intelligence, which leads to cities being engulfed by vegetation. Meanwhile, a task force unites to fight this battle.

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: This is Film - Action Category.

programme.title: The Captain
programme.desc: A pilot and his crew leave no stone unturned to ensure the safety of passengers after a plane's windshield shatters at 30,000 feet.

programme.title: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: Edward, a business executive, meets a struggling prostitute, Vivian, and hires her to stay with him for a week. However, things take unexpected turns when he falls in love with her.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: The vacation of Hercule Poirot, a Belgian detective, is cut short as he investigates the murder of an heiress who was shot dead during her honeymoon.

When the Hollywood Reservoir dam breaks, Bobby and the 118 race into action to save passengers on a city bus that has crashed into a building several stories in the air; the team adjusts to life as first responders during the pandemic.

In the aftermath of the dam break, massive mudslides wreak havoc throughout Los Angeles; Athena fights to save herself and an agoraphobic woman after her house collapses; a group of pregnant women trapped in a submerged house.

The team races to save a man under siege by his high-tech smart home; a yoga teacher loses her vision; Athena hunts down a bank robber disguised by COVID-19 protocols; members of the 118's crew prepare for an out-of-state mission.

Athena investigates a mysterious murder during a neighborhood block party; the 118 rush to save lives endangered by a bomb threat; Chimney has a hard time keeping secrets when Maddie and Buck's parents come to town.
The 118 races to save the lives of workers trapped in a factory fire; Maddie reveals a painful family secret that causes Buck to confront his childhood and answer why he is the daredevil he is today.

The 118 has a day from hell with a never-ending series of bizarre emergency calls; a man tapes himself to a freeway billboard; a restaurant manager destroys his own business; Eddie feels a spark with Christopher's former teacher.

A man gets pinned under a Humvee; a garage band rocks out too hard; Michael notices strange behavior at a nearby apartment; Hen's mother unexpectedly arrives and announces she is moving to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Live: League One Volleyball
programme.desc: From H-E-B Center in Cedar Park, Texas.
The 118 are called to the tarmac when a flight attendant reaches her limit with her flight's passengers; Eddie worries Christopher will not accept him dating; Buck reconnects with an old flame.

Athena and the 118 race to save lives after a drunken driver causes a deadly pileup on the freeway; Maddie goes into labor; Hen and Karen are devastated as they prepare their foster daughter to be reunited with her birth mother.

The 118 responds to calls dealing with parents and their children, including a disastrous birthday party thrown by a mommy blogger; Athena and Michael talk to May about her past suicide attempt; Chimney and Maddie adjust to life with their newborn.

The members of the 118 rush to the site of a hit-and-run that leaves a familiar face in critical condition; with Buck's help, Athena investigates the case of a missing woman; Josh recalls an emergency in 2006 that led him to become a first responder.

programme.title: Live: AFL Premiership Football
programme.desc: From Brighton Homes Arena in Queensland, Australia.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Kansas State (11-16) visits Colorado (15-12) at CU Events Center. The Wildcats look to rebound from a loss to Texas Tech behind P.J. Haggerty, who averages 23.5 points. The Buffaloes seek another home win after beating Oklahoma State 83-69.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Mountain West battle intensifies as the top two seeds collide in San Diego. Utah State holds a slim lead in the standings, but they face a daunting test in an Aztecs team that hasn't lost at home to the Aggies since last season's tournament run.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Butler (15-13) visits Villanova (21-6) at Finneran Pavilion for a Big East game. The Bulldogs seek a third straight win, while the Wildcats look to rebound from a loss to No. 5 UConn. Villanova is third and Butler is seventh in the standings.

programme.title: NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series hits EchoPark Speedway for the Fr8 Racing 208. Drivers face a 208-mile test in this early-season showdown. Competitors vie for the checkered flag and a spot in Victory Lane to build season momentum.

programme.title: We've Lost Dale Earnhardt: 25 Years Later
programme.desc: In the 25 years since the death of Dale Earnhardt, much about NASCAR has changed... and much has stayed the same. Earnhardt's friends, competitors, and fans, as well as current drivers, reflect on the Intimidator's life, legacy, and lasting impact.

programme.title: Live: Horse Racing
programme.desc: The best racehorses square off in the premier races from across the country.

programme.title: Big Time Hoops

programme.title: Women's Football Weekly
programme.desc: Discover the best of the action from the top divisions of women's football in Italy, Germany and the Netherlands with this brand-new highlights show.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A woman takes a cab ride back home from the airport. En route, she unexpectedly has an insightful conversation with the driver regarding the important relationships in life.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: As Eddie and Venom are tirelessly pursued by forces from both of their worlds, they find themselves out of options and left with a shattering last resort.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

programme.title: I'm in Love with the Villainess
programme.desc: Rei Ohashi, an overworked employee, passes away after which she is reincarnated as Rae Taylor, her favourite video game's heroine, and gets attracted to Claire Francois, the main antagonist.

programme.title: Robotics;Notes
programme.desc: In a world where augmented reality is almost real, two students named Kaito and Akiho face a big problem. However, they try hard to save their robot friend from danger.

programme.title: Robotics;Notes
programme.desc: In a world where augmented reality is almost real, two students named Kaito and Akiho face a big problem. However, they try hard to save their robot friend from danger.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: CIA agent Evelyn Salt's life takes an ugly turn when she is accused of planning the assassination of the Russian president. However, she flees and sets out to prove her innocence.
Micky, a maths professor, enlists five gifted students to use their abilities to win millions at blackjack in Las Vegas. He exploits their talents for personal gain in the glamorous casino city.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: Chip, a cable technician, sets his sights on befriending Steven, a new customer whom he takes a fancy to. But when Steven spurns their friendship, Chip immediately starts to wreak havoc in his life.

programme.title: Don't Breathe 2
programme.desc: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: After a near-fatal accident, New York City paramedic Cassandra gains the ability to see into the future. Soon, her visions lead her to protect three young girls from a mysterious enemy.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: As Robert McCall finds himself forming a new bond with the locals of an Italian town, the region's oppression by the Mafia triggers him to protect his people.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker tries to stop the Vulture from selling weapons made with advanced Chitauri technology while trying to balance his life as an ordinary high school student.

programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns the Monkey Muay Thai skills and vows to avenge her death. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle….

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Sivalinga

programme.desc: Arivazhagan plans to contest the local body elections. However, in an attempt to win, he strives to bribe the other candidates.

programme.title: The Warrior
programme.desc: After enduring a ruthless gangster's cruelty, a former doctor transforms into a police officer and returns to his city on a quest for justice.

programme.title: Dora And The Lost City Of Gold
Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget gets uncomfortable in her relationship with Mark after learning that he is averse to change and holds traditional values. She also struggles to deal with her new boss.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something woman resolves to finally take control of her life once and for all, while looking for h love.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While trying to escape the evil wizard Gargamel, the blue-skinned Smurfs get sucked into a vortex that teleports them to New York. Thereafter, they try their best to find a way back home.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: Sophie, an aspiring writer assisted by the secretaries of Juliet, sets out to unite Claire with her long-lost love. While on her journey, she finds herself drawn to Claire's grandson.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A spirited rivalry grows when Peter pushes boundaries with Thomas McGregor, creating chaos around Bea as she offers calm reassurance amid playful tension and shifting intentions.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When grieving architect David moves into a new apartment, he finds the spirit of the last tenant, workaholic doctor Elizabeth, still very much in-residence.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: A couple search for each other years after the night they first met, fell in love, and separated, convinced that one day they'd end up together.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a 70-year-old widower, realises that he is not cut out for retirement. He then applies to become a senior intern for a sceptical boss at an online fashion site.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: When Flint learns that his machine is creating dangerous food-animal hybrids on Swallow Falls, he sets out with his friends to save his home. However, they soon realise that they have been deceived.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: Realising that Sam has still not come to terms with his wife Maggie's death, his eight-year-old son Jonah forces him to call a national radio talk show, with the hopes of finding him a companion.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Sports agent Jerry Maguire tries to get back on his feet after being fired from his job. However, the only client he has is Rod Tidwell, a disgruntled football player who wants a better contract.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.
